lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨ ਲਾਲ ਅਨੂਪ ਸਰਬ ਸਾਧਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mohan laal anoop sarab saadhaareea |
lines.english: The Fascinating and Beauteous Beloved is the Giver of support to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਕੀਏ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਅਨੇਕ ਇਕਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai kee mitr anek ikas balihaareea |
lines.english: I have made many friends, but I am a sacrifice to the One alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਿਖਾਰੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur niv niv laagau paae dehu dikhaareea |3|
lines.english: I bow low and fall at the Feet of the Guru; if only I could see the Lord! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਉ ਸੂਖਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: chahu dis japeeai naau sookh savaareea |
lines.english: His Name is chanted in the four directions; those who chant it are embellished with peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਗੁਣ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਨਾਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰ ਭੰਡਾਰੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh gun kis hee naeh har poor bhanddaareea |4|
lines.english: No one has all virtues; the Lord alone is filled to overflowing with them. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕਾਢਿਓ ਭੁਜਾ ਪਸਾਰਿ ਮੋਹ ਕੂਪਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaadtio bhujaa pasaar moh koopaareea |
lines.english: The Guru reached out to me, and gave me His Arm; He lifted me up, out of the pit of emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਆਹੀ ਓੜਿ ਤੁਹਾਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: mai aahee orr tuhaar naanak balihaareea |5|
lines.english: I seek Your Protection; Nanak is a sacrifice to You. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai paaeo sarab nidhaan akath kathaareea |
lines.english: I have obtained the treasure of all; His Speech is unspoken and subtle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਜੀਤਿਓ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਹਾਰੀਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: mai jeetio janam apaar bahur na haareea |6|
lines.english: I have won the incomparable life, and I shall not lose it again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਧਾ ਰਤਨੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਅਪਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ladhaa ratan amol apaareea |
lines.english: Servant Nanak has received the invaluable and incomparable jewel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤ ਬਾਹ ਲੁਡਾਰੀਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har daragah sobhaavant baah luddaareea |7|
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord, I am honored and glorified; I swing my arms in joy. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਕਹਉ ਪੁਕਾਰੀਆ ॥੮॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa bhaujal tareeai khau pukaareea |8|12|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, I cross over the terrifying world-ocean; I proclaim this loudly to all. ||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਏਕ ਮੰਗੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap jihavaa har ek mango |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the One Lord with your tongue, and ask for Him alone. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਭਜੋ ॥
lines.translit: taj haumai gur giaan bhajo |
lines.english: Renounce your ego, and dwell upon the spiritual wisdom of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਰੰਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: naaraaein har rang rango |
lines.english: Dye yourself in the color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਗਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so sang na geo |
lines.english: Whatever you see, shall not go with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤੁ ਮੂੜੁ ਲਗੇ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saakat moorr lage pach mueo |2|
lines.english: The foolish, faithless cynics are attached - they waste away and die. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮ ਲਿਖਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mil sangat dhur karam likhio |1|
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny, join the Sangat, the Holy Congregation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਹਿਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kott madhe kinai guramukh lahio |3|
lines.english: Among millions, how rare is that Gurmukh who attains the Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: mohan naam sadaa rav rahio |
lines.english: The Name of the Fascinating Lord is all-pervading forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਨਮੋ ਨਮੋ ॥
lines.translit: har santan kar namo namo |
lines.english: Greet the Lord's Saints humbly, with deep respect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਅਤੁਲੁ ਸੁਖੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: nau nidh paaveh atul sukho |4|
lines.english: You shall obtain the nine treasures, and receive infinite peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨ ਅਲੋਵਉ ਸਾਧ ਜਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: nain alovau saadh jano |
lines.english: With your eyes, behold the holy people;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਤਜੋ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu tajo |
lines.english: Abandon sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hiradai gaavahu naam nidho |5|
lines.english: in your heart, sing the treasure of the Naam. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ਦੀਪ ਬਲਿਓ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur giaan drirraaeo deep balio |7|
lines.english: when the Guru implants spiritual wisdom within you, and lights that lamp. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਹੁ ਤੇ ਰਹਿਓ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: janam maran duhu te rahio |6|
lines.english: Thus you shall be rid of both birth and death. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਘਰ ਤੇ ਮਿਟਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: dookh andheraa ghar te mittio |
lines.english: Pain and darkness shall depart from your home,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸੋ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa so paar pario |
lines.english: One who serves the Lord crosses over to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਿਓ ॥੮॥੧॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak guramukh jagat tario |8|1|13|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Gurmukh saves the world. ||8||1||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: merai man sabh sukh paaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind has obtained all comforts. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤ ਭਰਮ ਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: har har gur gur karat bharam ge |
lines.english: Dwelling upon the Lord, Har, Har, and the Guru, the Guru, my doubts have been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 5 gaurree |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl, Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦੀਪਾਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agiaan andheraa mitt geaa gur giaan deepaaeo |2|
lines.english: The darkness of ignorance has been dispelled; the Guru has lit the lamp of spiritual wisdom. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਤੋ ਜਲਤੋ ਤਉਕਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਸੀਤਲਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: balato jalato taukiaa gur chandan seetalaaeo |1|
lines.english: I was burning, on fire, and the Guru poured water on me; He is cooling and soothing, like the sandalwood tree. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਕੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਗਹਰੋ ਚਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਨਾਵ ਤਰਾਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: paavak saagar gaharo char santan naav taraaeo |3|
lines.english: The ocean of fire is so deep; the Saints have crossed over, in the boat of the Lord's Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਮ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਧਰਮ ਸੁਚ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਗਹਿ ਭੁਜਾ ਆਪਾਇਓ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naa ham karam na dharam such prabh geh bhujaa aapaaeo |4|
lines.english: I have no good karma; I have no Dharmic faith or purity. But God has taken me by the arm, and made me His own. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਖੰਡਨੁ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੋ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bhau khanddan dukh bhanjano bhagat vachhal har naaeo |5|
lines.english: The Destroyer of fear, the Dispeller of pain, the Lover of His Saints - these are the Names of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਨੀਆਰੇ ਕੀ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਓ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: niraguneeaare kee benatee dehu daras har raaeo |7|
lines.english: I am worthless - I offer this prayer, O my Lord King: "Please, grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan." ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥਹ ਨਾਥ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦੀਨ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥ ਸੰਤ ਓਟਾਇਓ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anaathah naath kripaal deen samrith sant ottaaeo |6|
lines.english: He is the Master of the masterless, Merciful to the meek, All-powerful, the Support of His Saints. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਤੁਹਾਰੀ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਆਇਓ ॥੮॥੨॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak saran tuhaaree tthaakur sevak duaarai aaeo |8|2|14|
lines.english: Nanak has come to Your Sanctuary, O my Lord and Master; Your servant has come to Your Door. ||8||2||14||
